references.text: Adema, F. 1966. A review of the herbaceous species of Polygala in Malesia (Polygonaceae). Blumea 14: 253-276
Kerrigan, RA. 2012. A treatment for Polygala of northern Australia. Australian Systematic Botany 25: 83-137
Martinez, A, P Moroni & JFB Pastore. 2022. A critical review of type specimens for Polygala species (Polygalaceae) collected during the Malaspina Expedition of 1789–1794. Brittonia 74: 107-122.
Meijden, R van der. 1982. Systematics and evolution of Xanthophyllum (Polygalaceae). Leiden Botanical Series 7: 3-159
Meijden, R van der. 1988. Polygalaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 455-539
Yang, AT & CF Chen. 2013. A revision of the genus Polygala L. (Polygalaceae) in Taiwan. Taiwania 58: 156-162

species.citation: Chodat , Bull. Herb. Boissier, 1st Sér. 4 (1896) 257. ssp. macranthum Chodat ex Meijden, Bot. J. Linn. Soc. 67 (1973) 118; Leiden Bot. Ser. 7 (1982) 109; Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1988) 520; Type: Ramos 24454, Samar. = Xanthophyllum flavovirens Elmer, LPB 10 (1939) 3776, nom. inval., no Latin descr.; Voucher: Elmer 16902 (MO, NA, NY), Luzon: Sorsogon, Irosin, Mt Bulusan, among shrubberies of light woods at c. 1250ft (381m), Aug-1916. Distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: NCR, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, MINDORO, SAMAR. Notes: Throughout the Philippines. Hill to montane forests, 380-1500(-1800)m. Native.
species.distribution: Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines. BASILAN, CAMIGUIN, LUZON: NCR, Sorsogon, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, Lanao del Sur, Zamboanga, MINDORO, PALAWAN, SAMAR.

species.citation: Roxb. , Pl. Coromandel 3 (1820) 82 ; Meijden, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1988) 500; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific Biodiv. 17 (2024) 12; Type: Roxburgh 363 (BM). = Xanthophyllum excelsum (Blume) Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind. 1(2) (1858) 129 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 386. = Xanthophyllum floriferum Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1674; Type: Elmer 12871 (L, holo; BISH, MO, NY, U, US, iso), Palawan: Palawan, Puerto Princesa, Mt Pulgar (Thumb Peak), in rich humus-covered soil of dense forests at 750ft (229m) on the trail to Napsan, Mar-1911. = Xanthophyllum multiramosum Elmer , LPB 5 (1913) 1676 ; Merrill, PJS 27 (1925) 29; Type: Elmer 8701 (L, holo; MO, NY, US, iso), Luzon: Benguet, Baguio, along a creek in pine forest, Mar-1907. = Xanthophyllum glandulosum Merr. , Publ. Bur. Sci. Gov. Lab. 35 (1906) 34; Type: Merrill 2335 (SING, US, iso), Luzon: Rizal, Tanay, May-1903. = Xanthophyllum loheri Merr. , PJS 27 (1925) 29 ; Merrill, EPFP 4 (1926) 252; Type: Loher 14978 (HUH), Luzon: Rizal, Balacbac, Jun-1912.
